name: Broadcast Agent
description: Handles notifications, announcements, and communication across channels

capabilities.name: self-describe
capabilities.description: Agent can describe its own purpose and capabilities

capabilities.name: issue-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub issues

capabilities.name: pr-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub pull requests

capabilities.name: multi-channel
capabilities.description: Agent can broadcast to multiple communication channels

capabilities.name: notification-management
capabilities.description: Agent can manage and route notifications
